facts.claim: Kuwait City is the capital and largest city of Kuwait.

Located at the heart of the country on the south shore of Kuwait Bay on the Persian Gulf, it is the political, cultural and economic primate city of the emirate, being home to all headquarters of most Kuwaiti corporations and entirety of its banking system.
Kuwait is a small Gulf state with Kuwait City as its center, known for Kuwait Towers, Salmiya seafront, and cooler winter tourism months.

Kuwait is a small country on the northwest shore of the Persian Gulf, bordered by Iraq and Saudi Arabia. Its capital, Kuwait City, holds over two-thirds of the population and features key areas like Salmiya’s seafront and the historic core near the Grand Mosque.

Kuwait City (/kʊˈweɪt/ ⓘ; Arabic: مدينة الكويت, romanised: Madinat al-Kuwayt) is the capital and largest city of Kuwait. Located at the heart of the country on the south shore of Kuwait Bay on the Persian Gulf, it is the political, cultural and economic primate city of the emirate, being home to the headquarters of most Kuwaiti corporations and the entirety of its banking system.
